  • AIRDROP

APECOIN DAO HAS LAUNCHED ITS FIRST PUBLIC AIRDROP

You need to connect your wallet before you can claim APE.

Verified Smart Contract Address: 0x025C6da5BD0e6A5dd1350fda9e3B6a614B205a1F

ApeCoin was initially based off of the Yuga NFTs, BAYC and Otherside DAO. We have come a long way, and feel the need to reward the WEB3 community. To make it fair for our DAO-holders (BAYC, Yuga NFTs, Otherside communities and $APE holders), they will have an increased chance of claiming additional $APE coins.

Disclaimer

To participate in the $APE coin airdrop your wallet must first be verified, this is to prevent empty wallets from entering, and to prevent bots from entering. A wallet signature might be asked to verify ownership of wallet.
